title: COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION - 211info
text: ALLCARE HEALTH MEDFORD OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF AllCare CCO coordinates health insurance services for Medicaid members assigned to its Coordinated Care Organization (CCO). Includes specialized information and referrals to healthcare providers for medical, dental, and behavioral health. Additional wellness benefits for AllCare CCO members include medical transportation, pain management, weight management programs, and a 24/7 nurse help line. AllCare CCO members can receive vouchers from providers for taking healthy actions such as attending appointments and tobacco cessation, to purchase items at the BABE Store such as diapers, books, and blankets. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in AllCare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Nurse Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 734-5520 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 734-5520 Nurse Helpline (844) 747-5656 TTY/TTD (800) 735-2900 Toll-free (888) 460-0185 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Insurance information AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, and Josephine Counties and zip codes 97410 and 97442 SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-2:30pm Services: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Eye Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Pain Management * Medicaid Recipients Pharmacy Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABE STORE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
